section_2.mandate: Abolish isolation. Execute Simultaneous Concurrency explicitly driven by the [p_BPMS] vector trauma and Specific Keys (9) and Specific Praxial (9).

simultaneous_concurrency_matrix.fractal_anatomy_trauma: Entity scales infinitely, geometry dictated entirely by [p_BPMS].
simultaneous_concurrency_matrix.specific_key_and_praxial key_concurrent_: Morphological movement MUST simultaneously execute ['Somatic Morphology Affordance Binding'] and ['Substrate Valency Threshold']. Resulting Friction MUST instantly trigger ['Transduction Guillotine'] Escrow penalties, which dynamically forces ['Entropy-Cannibalism'] and ['Ontological Sedimentation'].
